question: How long had I been watching stand-up comedy specials regularly when I attended the open mic night at the local comedy club?

retrieval_results.context:
The user attended an open mic night last month
The user found it amazing to see people trying out their material in front of a live audience at the open mic night
The user studies other comedians' performances to learn structure, pacing, and delivery
The user is still having trouble finding humor in mundane situations despite attending the open mic night
The user is seeking advice on joke writing to improve their stand-up comedy craft
The user wants to avoid being too hard on themselves while improving their comedy
The user plans to start recording stand-up performances for review
